title: ハードボイルド・ラーニング

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Brian! Please take me under your wing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What's up with you all of a sudden? If you're
talking about training, you better look elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No, this isn't about running. I wanna learn all
about your behavior!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What the hell?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: YES! That's exactly what I'm talkin' about! That's what I'm tryna learn!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch, you're gonna tag along behind me anyway,
aren't you? Fine, do whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Vodka begins to follow Narita Brian
wherever she goes.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Interesting. So you don't eat veggies...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Then from now on, I won't either!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Mhm, mhm... You don't talk with anyone during
break time either...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Gotcha... I'll do the same.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You're so cool how you walk around with that
twig in your mouth.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Maybe I can find a twig layin' around over
there!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch... Vodka, listen up.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're trying to be like me, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah. 'Cause I wanna be cool, like you are...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You want to be cool. And you think acting like
me will do that?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I mean...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Copying me won't make Vodka seem any cooler.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Get it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I see your point! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Also, don't go putting any old twig in your mouth.
You'll get sick.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh, but what about yours?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I made this myself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoa! A DIY twig?! You're the coolest!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Would you cut that out already?!
